issues.original_text: due to a lack of kernel and collective optimization in the ROCm software stack
issues.description: The term 'kernel' is translated as English 'Kernel' here, but in paragraph 6 ('poorly optimized kernels') it was translated as '算子' ('算子优化严重拉胯'). This creates internal inconsistency.
issues.why_it_matters: Consistent terminology is crucial in hardcore tech articles to prevent reader confusion and maintain a professional tone.
issues.suggestion: Change 'ROCm 软件栈缺乏相应的 Kernel 与集合通信优化' to 'ROCm 软件栈缺乏相应的算子与集合通信优化'.

issues.description: The abbreviation 'Disagg' is annotated again as 'Disagg (分离)', even though it was already introduced and annotated in paragraph 0 ('Disagg (分离) 架构'). The same repeated annotation occurs in paragraph 9.
issues.why_it_matters: Repeated parenthetical annotations clutter the text and interrupt the reading flow for advanced readers.
issues.suggestion: Remove the repeated annotation. Use 'GB200 Dynamo+TRT Disagg' in paragraph 3, and 'Disagg 预填充' in paragraph 9.

issues.description: The term is translated as 'WideEP（宽专家并行）', whereas the glossary specifies '宽专家并行 (WideEP)', and paragraph 9 uses '宽专家并行（WideEP）'.
issues.why_it_matters: Inconsistent abbreviation placement (English(Chinese) vs Chinese(English)) looks unpolished.
issues.suggestion: Standardize to '宽专家并行 (WideEP) 算子' to match the glossary and subsequent usage.

issues.description: The word 'token' is in lowercase ('单卡总 token 吞吐量'), whereas in paragraphs 14 and 21 it is correctly capitalized as 'Token' ('数十亿个 Token', '每百万 Token 成本').
issues.why_it_matters: Capitalization consistency for core technical terms improves typographic quality.
issues.suggestion: Change 'token' to 'Token' ('单卡总 Token 吞吐量').
